T0237.title: Ban Evasion Guide
T0237.definition: A guide that teaches how to maliciously report an account with no obvious violations and get it banned by exploiting loopholes in platform policies.
T0237.description: These tutorials typically break down weaknesses in moderation systems, such as triggering automatic penalties through mass complaints or fabricating violation screenshots. Users do not need advanced technical skills; by following the steps they can get a competitor’s shop, livestream, or channel taken down. Such guides circulate in underground groups via cloud links or documents and are a common tool for malicious competition and extortion.
T0237.usageExample: Want a free wwg tutorial for XX platform?
